parents.subject: LU-18986 mgs: server part of new registration protocol

commit.subject: LU-0000 debug: bisect LU-19103
commit.message:
LU-0000 debug: bisect LU-19103

This patch is to bisect the issue in LU-19103.

8f819877be20240028bc34eb5173e6dd90acdd29

LU-18986 mgs: server part of new registration protocol

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Signed-off-by: Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I5e8c72b670937b649b49789a58568a84a611a76d
